entries.content_html:
SCIM provisioning: HCP now supports SCIM (System for Cross-domain Identity Management) provisioning for automated user and group lifecycle management. With SCIM enabled, you can automatically sync user and group changes from your identity provider to HCP, including:

  • User creation, modification, and deletion
  • Group creation, modification, and deletion
  • Group membership updates

SCIM provisioning is available for organizations with SAML SSO configured. Supported identity providers include Microsoft Entra ID, Okta, Ping ID, and IBM Verify.

For more information, refer to SCIM provisioning.
